caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a dark green hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters sits in a recording studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, white banners feature a logo with five gold stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE." A red and white sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "BOSS" in large red letters. To the right, a black mug features the text "TALK OUT" and "BOSS" in red. A small black speaker with a logo is visible on the left side of the table. Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, looking slightly to his left with a focused expression while speaking into the microphone. The scene remains static with no changes in position, lighting, or camera angle, capturing a consistent moment of a podcast recording.
